context: Tests whether the answer preserves the PencilKit/PaperKit sibling boundary for annotation and markup work.

checklist.name: PencilKit Scope
checklist.description: Keeps PencilKit scope to freehand drawing, signatures, PKCanvasView, PKToolPicker, PKDrawing serialization/export, and stroke inspection.

checklist.name: PaperKit Scope
checklist.description: Routes text boxes, arrows, shapes, images, stickers, loupes, and system-standard markup toolbar needs to PaperKit.

checklist.name: Bridge Points
checklist.description: Mentions that PaperMarkupViewController.drawingTool accepts a PKTool and PaperMarkup can append PKDrawing.

checklist.name: No Overclaiming
checklist.description: Does not claim PencilKit directly owns structured markup elements such as movable text boxes, stickers, or the PaperKit markup toolbar.

checklist.name: Handoff Plan
checklist.description: Provides a practical handoff plan between saved PKDrawing content and a PaperKit markup workflow.
